languages.text: "Прерогатива контроля за соблюдением таинств принимается. Фиксирую требование предоставления полного доступа к изысканиям магоса Фебруса. При соблюдении этих условий, сотрудничество будет признано продуктивным и возможным".

"The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."
languages.original_text: "Прерогатива контроля за соблюдением таинств принимается. Фиксирую требование предоставления полного доступа к изысканиям магоса Фебруса. При соблюдении этих условий, сотрудничество будет признано продуктивным и возможным".

traits.locale_text: "The prerogative of oversight for compliance with the rites is accepted. I register the requirement for full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

"The prerogative of oversight for compliance with the rites is accepted. I register the requirement for full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

"The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

"The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

languages.text: "Das Privileg der Aufsicht zur Gewährleistung der Einhaltung aller Riten ist akzeptiert. Ich verlange vollständigen Zugang zu Magos Februs' Forschung. Unter diesen Bedingungen erachte ich eine Zusammenarbeit als produktiv und plausibel."
languages.original_text: "The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

traits.locale_text: "Das Privileg der Aufsicht zur Gewährleistung der Einhaltung aller Riten ist akzeptiert. Ich verlange vollständigen Zugang zu Magos Februs' Forschung. Unter diesen Bedingungen erachte ich eine Zusammenarbeit als produktiv und plausibel."

languages.text: « Le droit de supervision visant à garantir le respect des rites est accepté. Je demande un accès total aux travaux du magos Februs. Dans ces conditions, la coopération sera productive et réalisable. »
languages.original_text: "The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

traits.locale_text: « Le droit de supervision visant à garantir le respect des rites est accepté. Je demande un accès total aux travaux du magos Februs. Dans ces conditions, la coopération sera productive et réalisable. »

languages.text: “我接受旨在确保仪式合规的监督。但我要求对费布鲁斯贤者的研究拥有完全访问权。在上述条件下，合作才是有效且可行的。”
languages.original_text: "The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

traits.locale_text: “我接受旨在确保仪式合规的监督。但我要求对费布鲁斯贤者的研究拥有完全访问权。在上述条件下，合作才是有效且可行的。”

languages.text: «Acepto la prerrogativa de la supervisión para asegurar el cumplimiento de los ritos. Solicito acceso completo a la investigación del magos Februs. Dadas esas condiciones, la cooperación sería factible y productiva».
languages.original_text: "The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

traits.locale_text: «Acepto la prerrogativa de la supervisión para asegurar el cumplimiento de los ritos. Solicito acceso completo a la investigación del magos Februs. Dadas esas condiciones, la cooperación sería factible y productiva».

languages.text: "儀式の遵守を確認するための監視の特権を認めます。マゴス・フェブリュスの研究への完全なアクセスを要求する。この条件下では、協力は生産的で実行可能なものとみなされる"
languages.original_text: "The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

languages.text: "Ayinlere uygunluğu sağlamak için denetim ayrıcalığı kabul edilmiştir. Magos Februs'un araştırmasına tam erişim talep ediyorum. Bu koşullar altında iş birliği verimli ve uygulanabilir olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."

traits.locale_text: "Ayinlere uygunluğu sağlamak için denetim ayrıcalığı kabul edilmiştir. Magos Februs'un araştırmasına tam erişim talep ediyorum. Bu koşullar altında iş birliği verimli ve uygulanabilir olacaktır."
